description: PA DOH: General operating rooms minimum 360 sq ft net clear floor area, exclusive of fixed or built-in cabinets and shelves.
citation: 28 Pa. Code §51.3 / PA DOH Guidelines for Design and Construction of Hospitals

description: PA DOH: Single-bed patient room minimum 120 sq ft clear floor area; multi-bed rooms minimum 100 sq ft per patient.
PA DOH: Intensive care cubicle minimum 150 sq ft clear floor area; open-plan ICU bay minimum 120 sq ft per patient.
PA DOH: Emergency treatment rooms minimum 120 sq ft per treatment space; trauma bays minimum 250 sq ft.
PA DOH: Patient care corridors minimum 8 ft clear width per NFPA 101 as adopted.
PA DOH: Surgical suites require 20 ACH total, 4 ACH outside air, positive pressure, HEPA filtration.
PA DOH: New hospital construction and renovation over $1M requires PA Department of Health plan review and approval prior to construction.
citation: Pennsylvania Health Care Facilities Act (35 P.S. §448.101)

description: PA DOH: NICU each infant care space minimum 120 sq ft per FGI guidelines as adopted; private NICU room minimum 150 sq ft.
